0.text: Peripheral and central consolidations in the upper and lower lobes of both lungs and the middle lobe of the right lung

1.text: Ground glass opacities in the upper and lower lobes of both lungs and the middle lobe of the right lung

2.text: Interlobular septal thickening within the ground glass areas

3.text: Linear atelectasis occasionally seen in both lungs

4.text: Findings consistent with viral pneumonia in both lungs
